address: Not stated (6-bed, 3-storey house; location to be confirmed)
lead_profile_text: 6-bed, 3-storey fully furnished house. Family vacated 6 months ago; property vacant throughout. Monthly carrying costs £1,500 (mortgage + rates + water + utilities — combined, individual amounts not broken out). Gas and electrical safety certs outstanding (landlord to arrange). Conservatory with active leak — to remain locked/inaccessible to guests. Office to remain locked. 1GB Virgin fibre installed. 1 lockbox already in porch; 3 key safes recommended total. Weekly property inspections between stays desired.
emotional_profile: Urgent and solution-focused — £9,000 in accumulated carrying costs over 6 months with zero income. Not questioning the STL model; just wants it set up fast. Responds to cost-of-delay framing and clear practical next-steps lists.
delay_timeline: ASAP; June 23 offer expiry creates signing urgency
green_light_types: no objections raised throughout comprehensive 9-topic meeting
urgent income need driving immediate action
large fully furnished property with zero setup cost
what_moved_them: Manchester 3-bed case study: £56k revenue / £36k net in year 1 — directly relevant social proof
Monthly cost comparison: £1,500 going out vs £4,000 coming in — powerful financial anchor
Weekly property inspection accommodation addressing his monitoring concern
No upfront fees given already-furnished property

conversion_gaps.gap: Gas and electrical safety certificates not yet in place
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Offer to facilitate via Stayful contractor network to remove the blocker and accelerate go-live

conversion_gaps.gap: Key safes not fully installed (only 1 lockbox in porch)
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Recommend and facilitate 3 key safe setup: guests, cleaners, landlord

conversion_gaps.gap: Conservatory leak — guest safety and liability risk if accessed
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Confirm conservatory will remain locked and inaccessible to guests; document exclusion clearly in listing and agreement

offer_framing: 13%+VAT (vs standard 15%+VAT) if signed by 23 June 2026. Software fee £42/month for booking calendar. 6-month minimum term, 3-month notice.
zac_income_intro: ~£4,000/month average net (range £2,900–£4,600); £379/night ADR; 68% occupancy; 12 comparables in area averaging 4.9 rating with ~40 reviews — not oversaturated. Year 1 adjusted: ~£3,000/month net; ~£1,500/month surplus after carrying costs.
zac_reassurance_phrases: weekly property inspections accommodated between stays
3 key safes recommended for secure multi-party access management
no upfront fees — property already fully furnished
zac_analogies: Manchester 3-bed achieved £56k revenue / £36k net in year 1
